personal_info.name: James Jiang
personal_info.summary: Software Engineer with commercial experience developing enterprise web applications, APIs and data-driven solutions using C#, ASP.NET Core, TypeScript, Angular, React and SQL Server. Recently expanded expertise into Generative AI and Agent-based applications, including intelligent support agents using LangChain, Google Gemini and tool-calling workflows. Seeking opportunities as an AI Engineer, Agent Engineer or AI Application Developer.

experiences.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and enhanced enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, ASP.NET Core and SQL Server across the full application stack.
Designed and implemented user-facing functionality, ensuring applications were robust, scalable, maintainable and aligned with business requirements.
Developed RESTful APIs and backend services in C# and ASP.NET Core to support secure and reliable system integrations.
Designed and optimised SQL Server database structures, queries and stored procedures, improving application performance and reducing response times by up to 30%.
Collaborated with stakeholders, business users and development teams to analyse requirements and deliver fit-for-purpose software solutions.
Participated in Agile development processes including sprint planning, estimation, implementation and release activities.
Developed automated deployment processes using Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines, improving release consistency and reducing manual deployment effort.
Conducted software testing, debugging and troubleshooting across front-end, API and database layers to maintain application reliability.
Applied coding standards, peer review practices and technical documentation processes to support long-term maintainability and knowledge sharing.
Investigated and resolved production issues while contributing recommendations for system improvements and application enhancements.

experiences.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed Angular/React-based front-end components and ASP.NET Core backend services within an Agile delivery environment (CareWindow platform).
Built and maintained REST APIs supporting authentication, business workflows and data integration requirements.
Collaborated with business stakeholders, developers and testers to implement user stories and deliver high-quality software solutions.
Assisted in database design, SQL optimisation and performance improvements to support scalable application growth.
Performed unit testing, debugging and defect resolution activities to improve software reliability and maintainability.
Contributed to technical documentation and supported software deployment and release activities.

projects.name: LangChain AI Support Agent
projects.description: Personal project — AI agent system with autonomous reasoning and tool calling
bullets: Built an AI Agent system capable of autonomous reasoning, tool calling and workflow execution using LangChain's ReAct agent framework.
Developed agent-based workflows for documentation retrieval, customer support automation and ticket management through dynamic tool orchestration.
Implemented prompt engineering techniques and agent instructions to improve decision-making accuracy and contextual response generation.
Designed reusable tool interfaces and validation layers using TypeScript and schema-based input validation.
Applied AI workflow automation principles to connect LLM reasoning with external business processes and operational systems.
Created rule-based prioritisation services to combine deterministic business logic with LLM-driven interactions.
Designed the solution following modern AI application architecture patterns with separation of agent logic, tools, services and configuration layers.
Evaluated future enhancements including RAG, vector search, multi-agent collaboration and conversation memory.

education.degree: Master of Information Technology (Network Systems and Cybersecurity)
Bachelor of Computer Science and Technology
